## Status

- [ ] Draft idea
- [ ] Needs design discussion
- [ ] Accepted for roadmap
- [ ] In progress
- [ ] Shipped

## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the feature or workflow.

## Why It Fits AURA

How does this support local-first, multimodal, or cross-device interaction?

- [ ] Desktop change
- [ ] Extension change
- [ ] Mobile change
- [ ] Protocol change
- [ ] Documentation change
